sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81556" key="periknu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περικνύω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n81556.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scratch or rub all round</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
